h1.visual_description: Large, bold, all-caps, sans-serif font, prefixed with a single digit and period.

h2.visual_description: Bold, all-caps, sans-serif font, slightly smaller than h1, prefixed with hierarchical numbering (e.g., 7.1.).

visual_matchers.semantic_meaning: Figure caption; rendered in a smaller, italicized serif font directly below images.
Numbered mathematical equation; centered on its own line with the index in parentheses at the right margin.
Page footer; contains the page number followed by the manual title in small-caps/all-caps sans-serif.

markdown_grammar.citation_format: Parenthetical references to figures (e.g., Figure 8.2) and equations (e.g., Equation (1)).

layout_info.margin_noise_patterns: Page number and document title 'APPLIED FLUID MECHANICS LAB MANUAL' located at the bottom margin.
